languages.text: "Поспеши, человек. Кровь примарха в моих венах взывает к отмщению".
"Make haste, human. The Primarch's blood in my veins calls out for vengeance."
languages.original_text: "Поспеши, человек. Кровь примарха в моих венах взывает к отмщению".

traits.locale_text: "Make haste, human. The primarch's blood in my veins calls out for vengeance."
"Make haste, human. The primarch's blood in my veins calls out for vengeance."
"Make haste, human. The primarch's blood in my veins calls out for vengeance."

languages.text: 「急げ、人間。私の血管に流れるプリマスの血が復讐を叫んでいる」
languages.original_text: "Make haste, human. The primarch's blood in my veins calls out for vengeance."

traits.locale_text: 「急げ、人間。私の血管に流れるプリマスの血が復讐を叫んでいる。」

languages.text: «Deprisa, human{mf|o|a}. La sangre del primarca que fluye por mis venas clama venganza».
languages.original_text: "Make haste, human. The Primarch's blood in my veins calls out for vengeance."

traits.locale_text: «Deprisa, human{mf|o|a}. La sangre del primarca que fluye por mis venas clama venganza».

languages.text: “加快动作，凡人。我血脉中的基因原体之血渴望着复仇。”
languages.original_text: "Make haste, human. The Primarch's blood in my veins calls out for vengeance."

traits.locale_text: “加快动作，凡人。我血脉中的基因原体之血渴望着复仇。”

languages.text: "Beeilt Euch, Mensch. Das Blut des Primarchen in meinen Venen schreit nach Vergeltung."
languages.original_text: "Make haste, human. The Primarch's blood in my veins calls out for vengeance."

traits.locale_text: "Beeilt Euch, Mensch. Das Blut des Primarchen in meinen Venen schreit nach Vergeltung."

languages.text: "Acele et insan. Damarlarımdaki Primark kanı, intikam için haykırıyor."
languages.original_text: "Make haste, human. The Primarch's blood in my veins calls out for vengeance."

traits.locale_text: "Acele et insan. Damarlarımdaki Primark kanı, intikam için haykırıyor."

languages.text: « Hâtez-vous, {mf|humain|humaine}. Le sang de primarque qui coule dans mes veines réclame vengeance. »
